title: Defending a Thesis — Advanced
description: When the committee is hostile: naming the disagreement, conceding core, protecting methodology.
summary_pt_br: Defesa hostil: nomeie o conflito, conceda o verdadeiro, proteja o estrutural, convide diálogo.

scenes.subtitle_en: When the committee is hostile: naming the disagreement, conceding core, protecting methodology.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Defesa hostil: nomeie o conflito, conceda o verdadeiro, proteja o estrutural, convide diálogo.

scenes.text_en: When the committee is hostile: naming the disagreement, conceding core, protecting methodology. Focus: defending a thesis — advanced. I hear that we disagree about the causal claim, not the data.
scenes.text_pt: Defesa hostil: nomeie o conflito, conceda o verdadeiro, proteja o estrutural, convide diálogo. Foco: defending a thesis — advanced. Percebo que discordamos da causa, não dos dados.

scenes.title: Defending a Thesis — Advanced
scenes.body_en: Hostile defense moves: NAME the disagreement ('I hear we disagree about X.'). CONCEDE what's true. PROTECT what's load-bearing. CLOSE by inviting continued dialogue.
scenes.body_pt: Defesa hostil: nomeie o conflito, conceda o verdadeiro, proteja o estrutural, convide diálogo.

examples.en: I hear that we disagree about the causal claim, not the data.
examples.pt: Percebo que discordamos da causa, não dos dados.

examples.en: I concede that a larger sample would strengthen the finding.
examples.pt: Concedo que amostra maior fortaleceria o achado.

examples.en: But the central methodology remains defensible on its own terms.
examples.pt: Mas a metodologia central permanece defensável.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Defending a Thesis — Advanced

exercise.question: Complete: "I hear that we ___ about the causal claim, not the data."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I hear that we disagree about the causal claim, not the data."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Percebo que discordamos da causa, não dos dados.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I concede that a larger sample would strengthen the finding.
I haven't heard anything about that.
exercise.explanation: Correct: "I concede that a larger sample would strengthen the finding."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Concedo que amostra maior fortaleceria o achado.

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Defending a Thesis — Advanced — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre defending a thesis — advanced. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Maya, a professor rejects your premise.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I hear we disagree about the premise.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: A larger sample would strengthen it.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Interpretation is debatable, but data is solid.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I welcome further dialogue after the defense.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: A defended thesis survives by conceding well.

scenes.title: The hostile defense
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe four moves under pressure. Use at least three defense terms.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In the defense chamber, Maya faced a committee member who had written three papers opposing her central claim.

paragraphs.speaker: Professor
paragraphs.en: Your causal claim simply does not follow from the data you present in chapter four — how do you respond?

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: I hear that we disagree about the causal claim, not about the data itself — and that distinction matters.

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: I concede that a larger sample would strengthen the finding, and I name that limitation in chapter six.

paragraphs.speaker: Professor
paragraphs.en: Fair. But you still defend the methodology?

paragraphs.speaker: Maya
paragraphs.en: The central methodology remains defensible on its own terms, and I welcome further dialogue after today.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Surviving a hostile defense, Maya learned, is the disciplined art of conceding exactly what you can afford to lose.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Defending a Thesis — Advanced". When the committee is hostile: naming the disagreement, conceding core, protecting methodology. I hear that we disagree about the causal claim, not the data. I concede that a larger sample would strengthen the finding. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Defending a Thesis — Advanced". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Defending a Thesis — Advanced".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Defending a Thesis — Advanced".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
